languages.text: "Я не знаю ни вас, ни вашу свиту. Откуда вам известна кодовая фраза моих агентов?" {n}Жесткий взгляд Ларии цепляется за каждую деталь вашей экипировки, словно она надеется отыскать в них объяснение происходящему.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Я не знаю ни вас, ни вашу свиту. Откуда вам известна кодовая фраза моих агентов?" {n}Жесткий взгляд Ларии цепляется за каждую деталь вашей экипировки, словно она надеется отыскать в них объяснение происходящему.{/n}

languages.text: "I do not know you or your retinue. How do you know my agents' code phrase?" {n}Laria's flinty gaze latches onto every detail of your apparel and equipment, as if she is hoping to find an explanation for what is happening.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я не знаю ни вас, ни вашу свиту. Откуда вам известна кодовая фраза моих агентов?" {n}Жесткий взгляд Ларии цепляется за каждую деталь вашей экипировки, словно она надеется отыскать в них объяснение происходящему.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I do not know you or your retinue. How do you know my agents' code phrase?" {n}Laria's flinty gaze latches onto every detail of your apparel and equipment, as if she is hoping to find an explanation for what is happening.{/n}

"I do not know you or your retinue. How do you know my agents' code phrase?" {n}Laria's flinty gaze latches onto every detail of your apparel and equipment, as if she is hoping to find an explanation for what is happening.{/n}

"I do not know you or your retinue. How do you know my agents' code phrase?" {n}Laria's flinty gaze latches onto every detail of your apparel and equipment, as if she is hoping to find an explanation for what is happening.{/n}

languages.text: “我不认识你，也不认识你的随从。你怎么会知道我手下特工的暗语？”{n}菈丽雅锐利的目光仔细审视着你的衣着和装备上的每一处细节，仿佛希望从中找到眼前这些怪事的答案。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not know you or your retinue. How do you know my agents' code phrase?" {n}Laria's flinty gaze latches onto every detail of your apparel and equipment, as if she is hoping to find an explanation for what is happening.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我不认识你，也不认识你的随从。你怎么会知道我手下特工的暗语？”{n}菈丽雅锐利的目光仔细审视着你的衣着和装备上的每一处细节，仿佛希望从中找到眼前这些怪事的答案。{/n}

languages.text: « Je ne vous connais pas, ni vous ni vos compagnons. Où avez-vous appris la phrase codée de mes agents ? » {n}L'œil torve, Laria scrute les moindres détails de votre accoutrement et de votre équipement, comme si elle espérait y trouver une explication à la situation actuelle.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not know you or your retinue. How do you know my agents' code phrase?" {n}Laria's flinty gaze latches onto every detail of your apparel and equipment, as if she is hoping to find an explanation for what is happening.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je ne vous connais pas, ni vous ni vos compagnons. Où avez-vous appris la phrase codée de mes agents ? » {n}L'œil torve, Laria scrute les moindres détails de votre accoutrement et de votre équipement, comme si elle espérait y trouver une explication à la situation actuelle.{/n}

languages.text: "Sizi de maiyetinizi de tanımıyorum. Ajanlarımın şifreli ifadesini nereden biliyorsunuz?" {n}Laria'nın çakmak çakmak bakışları, olan bitene bir açıklama bulmayı umuyormuş gibi kıyafetinin ve ekipmanının her tarafında geziniyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not know you or your retinue. How do you know my agents' code phrase?" {n}Laria's flinty gaze latches onto every detail of your apparel and equipment, as if she is hoping to find an explanation for what is happening.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Sizi de maiyetinizi de tanımıyorum. Ajanlarımın şifreli ifadesini nereden biliyorsunuz?" {n}Laria'nın çakmak çakmak bakışları, olan bitene bir açıklama bulmayı umuyormuş gibi kıyafetinin ve ekipmanının her tarafında geziniyor.{/n}

languages.text: «No les conozco ni a usted ni a su séquito. ¿Cómo sabe el código de mis agentes?». {n}La mirada pétrea de Laria repara en cada detalle de tu indumentaria y equipamiento, como si esperara encontrar una explicación de lo que ocurre.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not know you or your retinue. How do you know my agents' code phrase?" {n}Laria's flinty gaze latches onto every detail of your apparel and equipment, as if she is hoping to find an explanation for what is happening.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No les conozco ni a usted ni a su séquito. ¿Cómo sabe el código de mis agentes?». {n}La mirada pétrea de Laria repara en cada detalle de tu indumentaria y equipamiento, como si esperara encontrar una explicación de lo que ocurre.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich kenne Euch oder Euer Gefolge nicht. Woher kennt Ihr die Losung meiner Agenten?" {n}Larias harter Blick erfasst jedes Detail deiner Kleidung und Ausrüstung, als würde sie hoffen, eine Erklärung für die Geschehnisse zu finden.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not know you or your retinue. How do you know my agents' code phrase?" {n}Laria's flinty gaze latches onto every detail of your apparel and equipment, as if she is hoping to find an explanation for what is happening.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich kenne Euch oder Euer Gefolge nicht. Woher kennt Ihr die Losung meiner Agenten?" {n}Larias harter Blick erfasst jedes Detail deiner Kleidung und Ausrüstung, als würde sie hoffen, eine Erklärung für die Geschehnisse zu finden.{/n}

languages.text: 「あなたもあなたの側近も知りません。私の代理人の暗号語をどのように知っているのですか？」{n}ラリアの鋭い視線はあなたの服装や装備のあらゆる細部を捉え、何が起きているのかを説明してくれるものがあると期待しているかのようです。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I do not know you or your retinue. How do you know my agents' code phrase?" {n}Laria's flinty gaze latches onto every detail of your apparel and equipment, as if she is hoping to find an explanation for what is happening.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「あなたもあなたの側近も知りません。私の代理人の暗号語をどのように知っているのですか？」{n}ラリアの鋭い視線はあなたの服装や装備のあらゆる細部を捉え、何が起きているのかを説明してくれるものがあると期待しているかのようです。{/n}
